raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally dispute the handling of a balance transfer investigation into a delay that is causing me financial hardship. 
On XX/XX/year>, I initiated a balance transfer of {$2000.00} from my XXXX XXXX  account XXXX  my Barclays Bank account. As of today, XX/XX/year>, Barclays has not yet delivered the funds XXXX  XXXX XXXX. 
I have contacted Barclays multiple times regarding this matter. Despite their repeated assurances that the payment has been processed, the funds have not been received by XXXX XXXX. Because of this delay XXXX the conflicting information provided by Barclays, I am now facing a " double balance '' situation where I am being charged interest XXXX  potentially late fees by XXXX for a balance that should have been cleared over a month ago.
